# Dhruvil Mistry — AI Engineer Portfolio
> Dhruvil Mistry is an AI Engineer specializing in building production-grade LLM systems, RAG pipelines, full-stack applications, and workflow automation.

## Contact & Profiles
- **Location:** Mumbai, India
- **Email:** dhruvilmistry16@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/dhruvilmistry16
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/dhruvil-codes
- **Twitter/X:** https://x.com/bydhruvil

## Key Resources
- [Portfolio Homepage](https://bydhruvil.in/): Summary, experience, contact, and certifications.
- [Projects](https://bydhruvil.in/projects): Directory of featured AI products.
- [Blog](https://bydhruvil.in/blog): Personal journey and technical posts (e.g., "From 50% Grades to OpenAI Hackathon").
- [Tech Stack](https://bydhruvil.in/stack): Detailed list of languages, frameworks, vector databases, and tools used.
- [Biography](https://bydhruvil.in/bio): Career story, education details, and FAQ notes.

## Flagship Projects
- **Minutz — AI Meeting Intelligence Platform:** Shipped a browser-native meeting recorder and asynchronous processing pipeline (FastAPI, Next.js, Whisper, GPT-4o, Supabase). Selected at the OpenAI × Outskill Hackathon.
- **Saral AI — Voice AI Receptionist:** Shipped a low-latency real-time voice receptionist over WebSocket connections (FastAPI, Groq, Sarvam AI).
- **Skin Cure — Multimodal Healthcare AI:** Trained a SwinV2 classifier on 28k dermatology images with confidence scores and local discovery (FastAPI, React, PyTorch).
- **Clarity — AI Reading Assistant:** Shipped a MV3 Chrome extension with zero-backend LLM abstraction (GPT-4o Mini, Claude Haiku, Gemini Flash).

## Core Technical Skills
- **AI & RAG:** LLM API integration (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini), RAG pipelines (LangChain, LlamaIndex), Prompt Engineering, LLM evaluation.
- **Vector DBs:** Qdrant, Pinecone, ChromaDB.
- **Frameworks & Languages:** Python, FastAPI, JavaScript, Next.js, React, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker.
- **Automation:** n8n workflow orchestration.
